# RolePatch — full agent brief

AI-powered resume tailoring. Score fit against a job description, rewrite bullets for the role, and prep interviews.

## Index

# RolePatch

AI-powered resume tailoring and job-application assistant.

## What it is

- Score resume fit against a job description
- Rewrite bullets for the role
- Cover letters, company research, STAR prep

## Who it's for

Job seekers who want reviewed, role-specific application materials — not generic AI fluff.

## Agent entrypoints

- https://rolepatch.com/llms.txt
- https://rolepatch.com/api/ai
- https://rolepatch.com/index.md

Dashboard routes require auth and are not agent-indexed.

## Product links

- Home: https://rolepatch.com/ — Product landing
- Pricing: https://rolepatch.com/pricing — Plans and limits
- Tools: https://rolepatch.com/tools — Public tools

## Machine surfaces

- https://rolepatch.com/llms.txt
- https://rolepatch.com/llms-full.txt
- https://rolepatch.com/api/ai
- https://rolepatch.com/index.md
- https://rolepatch.com/sitemap.xml
- https://rolepatch.com/robots.txt
